review: A few months ago I had my birthday here - rented one of their private rooms. The experience was spectacular!  The service was great, the room was awesome, the open bar was wonderful, the food was excellent and we were able to hook up our music to their sound system and had a little dance party!  It was very memorable and I highly recommend getting a private room and choosing a high end package as it is really worth it!  The room was setup perfectly with a big table in the center with beautiful linens, small tables on each end of the room, and then a few high top tables. Hydrangeas were at the center of each table.  And the floor to ceiling windows with view of south philly was gorgeous in the day light as well as at night. Taking a few steps to the bar made it easy to sip a cocktail while enjoying time with my company and the view. The butlered hors d' oeuvres kept coming and then my steak was cooked perfectly for my main entree!  Then came the desert and a lot of laughing and dancing with my family and friends !!
